non_blocking_issues: cross-store crash-atomicity: after mTLS validation passes, the multi-step persist (mTLS → Basic pw → Tunnel pw → profile save) is still not a full crash-transaction (pre-existing architectural limit, NOT the round-3 deterministic partial-commit bug which is fixed)
corrupted cert material on a NON-active profile: save may fail with the error shown mainly on the outer screen, not prominently in the dialog (edge case: corrupted-data recovery UX)
one tautological test assertion (assertSame(r.stagedP12, r.stagedP12)) — should capture the input var and assert same-instance; does not affect the conclusion
notes: Round-4. Round-3 blocker (saveHostProfile write-ordering) CONFIRMED CLOSED: applyClientCertSave (throwable mTLS validate+persist) now runs before Basic/Tunnel writes — all mTLS failure modes throw before any credential write; no deterministic partial commit. Reorder does not pre/miss-trigger reconfigure+ForceReconnect (still last). Pure-fn extraction verified behavior-preserving (buildSaveCall/buildTestCall positional args + section-off credential clearing + effectivePasswordEdited + selectedGroup + profileIdSnap/pwEditedSnap for basicAuth-off all match inline; onSave Function11 / onTestConnection Function14 unchanged). clientCleared predicate + Save-disable + Error gate (mtlsEnabled-scoped) all correct. 49+5 tests have real assertions covering the state machine (not coverage padding). check.sh --full green (kover 62.73%/71.99%), emulator 6/6. PASS 9.6.
